headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -26.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 28% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 136 quotes including 99 at strong intensity, showing people are expressing anger forcefully today.

• Despite the high quote volume, frustration scores dropped significantly from yesterday's peak and remain in the middle of the typical range.

• Fears plummeted from positive territory yesterday to well below average, while optimism stayed consistently low.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
